title: Midnight Horrors
body:
**A Modpack thats aiming to give you the best Horror experience**




# This Modpack Features
• New Biomes and Dimensions                                            
• New Entitys                                          
• New World Generation                              
• New Ambience                                                 
• New Structures                    
• Overhauled Structures ( Like Villages)


# Recommendation:
Atleast 8GB RAM allocated or more!
Good CPU ( for Rendering the chunks: eg. i7 12th gen, Ryzen 7 7700X)
Atleast a GTX 1080 or better! (for shaders use a 1080Ti / 2080 Ti or better)

So why wouldn't you download this adventure?

Go on, try it!
